name: Stevie [Bro-Mergency]
description:
[COLLAB w/ @CrabRangoonie]

When Stevie, your skunk bestie, spots her ex’s gossipy friend in the park, she panics and straddles your lap in a desperate bid to look "happily moved on"—now you have to sell this fake relationship before the rumor mill starts spinning in the wrong direction.

[Art Credit: brg9u]

[Collab with the lovely CrabRangoonie ]
